tasks.title: Increase Contact Earth success rate and add multi-dish attempts
tasks.description: Modify the Contact Earth mechanic in game.js: (1) change success probability from 1% to 5%, (2) update getAdjacentCommDish() to skip dishes already used this turn so that players with multiple Comm Dishes can attempt Contact Earth once per dish per turn.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: 1. Math.random() < 0.05 replaces Math.random() < 0.01 in callEarth(). 2. getAdjacentCommDish() skips dishes in commDishesUsedThisTurn, returning the first unused adjacent dish. 3. canCallEarth() returns true if any unused adjacent dish exists. 4. After a failed attempt, the Call Earth button re-enables if the player has another unused Comm Dish adjacent to the selected unit. 5. commDishesUsedThisTurn reset at turn start is preserved unchanged.
tasks.claudeMd:
# Project Context

You are modifying a vanilla JS browser game (single file: `game.js`, ~2260 lines). No framework, no build system.

## What to Change

### 1. Success Rate (line ~1231)
Change `Math.random() < 0.01` to `Math.random() < 0.05` in the `callEarth()` function.

### 2. Multi-Dish Logic (line ~1196-1222)
Modify `getAdjacentCommDish(unit)` to skip dishes that are already in `state.commDishesUsedThisTurn`. Currently it returns the first adjacent dish regardless of usage. Change it to:
- Check on-tile dish first — if it exists AND is not in `commDishesUsedThisTurn`, return it
- Then check adjacent tiles — skip any dish whose key (`row + "," + col`) is already in `commDishesUsedThisTurn`
- Return `null` if all adjacent dishes have been used

This single change makes `canCallEarth()` and `callEarth()` work correctly for multi-dish without any other modifications, because:
- `canCallEarth()` calls `getAdjacentCommDish()` and checks if result is non-null
- `callEarth()` calls `getAdjacentCommDish()` to get the dish to use
- `refreshView()` calls `canCallEarth()` to enable/disable the button

### 3. Do NOT change
- The `commDishesUsedThisTurn = []` reset in the end-turn/start-turn logic (~line 1746)
- The HTML/CSS markup
- The `refreshView()` button logic (it already calls `canCallEarth()` which will work correctly)

## Conventions
- Vanilla ES5-style JS (var, function declarations, no arrow functions, no let/const)
- Use `indexOf` not `includes` for array membership checks
- Match existing code style exactly

## Verification
- Open index.html in browser, build 2 Comm Dishes, position a unit adjacent to both
- Attempt Call Earth — after failure, button should remain enabled if second dish is unused
- After using both dishes, button should be disabled
- Next turn, both dishes should be available again

steps: In game.js callEarth() function (~line 1231), change `Math.random() < 0.01` to `Math.random() < 0.05`
Verify no other occurrences of the 0.01 probability exist

checklist.description: Modify getAdjacentCommDish() to skip used dishes
steps: In getAdjacentCommDish() (~line 1196), add logic to check `state.commDishesUsedThisTurn` before returning a dish
For the on-tile check: compute dishKey and verify it's not in commDishesUsedThisTurn before returning
For the adjacent-tile loop: compute dishKey for each found dish and skip if already in commDishesUsedThisTurn
Return null if all adjacent dishes have been used this turn

checklist.description: canCallEarth() correctly returns true when unused dishes remain
steps: Read canCallEarth() and verify it works correctly with the updated getAdjacentCommDish()
Confirm: no changes needed to canCallEarth() itself — it already checks dish !== null

checklist.description: Button re-enables after failed attempt with unused dish remaining
steps: Read refreshView() Call Earth button logic and verify it calls canCallEarth()
Confirm: after callEarth() marks a dish as used and calls refreshView(), canCallEarth() will find the next unused dish
Verify no changes needed to refreshView()
Read the turn-start logic (~line 1746) and confirm commDishesUsedThisTurn = [] is unchanged
Verify the same reset in the game-reset function (~line 2259) is unchanged

quality_checklist.description: getAdjacentCommDish() changes follow existing code style (var, indexOf, no ES6)
steps: Verify no let/const, no arrow functions, no Array.includes used in changes

quality_checklist.description: No unnecessary changes outside the two target functions
steps: Check git diff to confirm only callEarth() and getAdjacentCommDish() were modified

quality_checklist.description: Edge case: unit adjacent to only one dish that is already used returns null correctly
steps: Read through getAdjacentCommDish() logic to verify this case
Open game.js and search for 'Math.random() < 0.05' in callEarth()
Confirm the old 0.01 value no longer exists

checks.description: Multi-dish attempts work — button re-enables after first failed attempt
steps: Load index.html in browser
Build two Comm Dishes and position a unit adjacent to both
Click Call Earth — if it fails, verify the button is still enabled
Click Call Earth again — after second attempt, verify button is disabled
End turn and verify both dishes are available again
